title: hymenophyllum exsertum
intro: Hymenophyllum exsertum, also known as the New Zealand filmy fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum exsertum are said to include the treatment of fever, colds, and other respiratory issues, as well as the relief of sore throats and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
